content.content:

- **Alice**: Painting
- **Charlie**: Swimming
- **Eve**: (Please refer to her blog at [Eve Blog](http://www.eve-blog.com) for more details)

You can manually post these hobbies to http://www.our-company.com. If there's anything else I can help with, let me know!
